description:
Reactive if= mount/unmount (§17.1). A click runs toggle() flipping @open false->true; the if=@open

mounts. ! is boolean negation (not = absence, E-TYPE-045). OQ1 NOTE: the whole-tree dom retains an impl#1-private
rationale: §17.1 reactive if= on a markup element mounts/unmounts the subtree as its boolean cell flips. A user click drives the flip through the wired handler. The whole-tree dom exposes impl#1's <template> if-guard anchor (OQ1 brittleness data point); anchored mode asserts only on the author's #panel.
